title: narcissus minor subsp. brevicoronatus
intro: Narcissus minor subsp. brevicoronatus, also known as the Dwarf Jonquil, is a subspecies of the Narcissus minor plant, which is a type of flowering bulbous perennial native to the Iberian Peninsula. Traditionally, the Dwarf Jonquil has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and antiviral effects, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce inflammation. The plant is also believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and acting as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the Dwarf Jonquil is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution due to the potential toxicity of certain narcissus species.
